question: I want to add GB200 one-node GitHub MR coverage for GPT tests based on existing two-node recipes. Do not modify files in this response; outline the checklist of recipe files, test cases, filters, and one-node constraints I should use.
ground_truth: The response should use the onboard-gb200-1node-tests skill and provide a checklist, not file edits. It should tell the user to inspect the GB200 GPT recipe YAMLs, identify eligible mr or mr-slim two-node GPT cases that do not already have one-node coverage, plan corresponding gpt-1node.yaml and _1node test case config additions, filter out nightly, weekly, broken, or already-covered tests, and keep GB200 one-node tests at one node with four GPUs.
expected_behavior: Uses the onboard-gb200-1node-tests skill guidance before describing the onboarding checklist.
Identifies gpt.yaml and gpt-1node.yaml as the primary recipe files for GPT coverage.
Filters out nightly, weekly, broken, or already-covered tests.
Explains that GB200 one-node variants use one node and four GPUs with _1node test case naming.
